chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Misc. Application No. 1277 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of main case ----------------------------------------------------- 07.03.2025 Ms. Hina Rahim, advocate for applicant Mr. Qamaruddin Nohri, D.P.G. PI Muhammad Fayyaz and SIP Nazir of PS Preedy South Karachi ------------------------------------ Learned counsel for applicant does not press the instant criminal miscellaneous application, the same is accordingly dismissed. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
